NIT Warangal – Admission, Cutoff, Fees & Placements 2026

Engineering Colleges, NIT Colleges

Overview

Institute NameNational Institute of Technology, Warangal
Also Known AsNITW
Institute TypeGovernment
Established1959
LocationWarangal, Telangana

NIT Warangal: Admission | Ranking | Fees

Also Known as

Also known as NIT Warangal, NITW and Regional Engineering College Warangal (RECW).

ADDRESS

National Institute of Technology, Hanumkonda, Warangal, Telangana - 506004

Nearest Airport and Railway Station

Rajiv Gandhi International Airport, Hyderabad
164 km
Kazipet Junction Railway Station
5 km
Warangal Railway Station
10 km

CAMPUS FACILITIES

RANKING

BodyCategoryRank (Year)
LatestPrevious
International Ranking
QS Asia University Rankings771-780 (2026)--
THE World University Rankings1201–1500 (2026)1201–1500 (2025)
THE Asia University Rankings401–500 (2025)351–400 (2024)
THE World Subject Rankings - Engineering801–1000 (2024)--
National Ranking
NIRF Overall Rankings63 (2025)53 (2024)
NIRF Engineering Rankings28 (2025)21 (2024)
The Week Best Technical Universities India14 (2023)--
The Week Top Engineering Colleges India9 (2025)10 (2024)

MODE OF ADMISSION

  • Candidates must appear for the JEE (Main) exam and either secure at least 75% marks (65% for SC/ST/PwD) in Class XII or be within the category-wise top 20 percentile in their respective Class XII board examination. For more details, refer to the JEE Main Performance Criteria in Class XII.
  • Admissions are based on the rank obtained in JEE (Main) through JoSAA Counselling and CSAB Special Round.

COURSES OFFERED

Please choose the course.

B.E./B.Tech. - 4 Years

  • Biotechnology
  • Chemical Engineering
  • Civil Engineering
  • Computer Science and Engineering
  • Computer Science and Engineering with specialization in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science
  • Electrical and Electronics Engineering
  • Electronics and Communication Engineering
  • Electronics and Communication Engineering with specialization in VLSI Design and Technology
  • Mathematics and Computing
  • Mechanical Engineering
  • Metallurgical and Materials Engineering

Integrated M.Sc. - 5 Years

  • Chemistry
  • Mathematics
  • Physics

NIT Warangal Seat Matrix

FEE STRUCTURE

Institute Fee

ParticularsAmount
One-Time Fees₹30,000
Tuition Fee (per Semester)₹62,500
Annual Fees₹12,500
Total₹1,05,000

Hostel Fee

ParticularsAmount
Hostel Caution Money (One-Time, Refundable)₹15,000
Hostel Seat Rent (per Semester)₹3,000 (Boys)
₹2,000 (Girls)
Electricity & Water Charges (per Semester)₹5,500
Other Fees (per Semester)₹7,500
Mess Advance (per Semester)₹15,000
Total₹46,000 (Boys)
₹45,000 (Girls)

Fee Waivers

  • 100% Tuition Fee waiver for SC/ST/PwD students.
  • 100% Tuition Fee remission for Most Economically Backward students with family income less than ₹1 lakh per annum.
  • 2/3rd Tuition Fee remission for Other Economically Backward students with family income between ₹1 lakh to ₹5 lakh per annum.

PLACEMENTS

  • 2024
  • Older
